All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AdminMovieFormUIController
Controller for the Admin Movie Form modal (AdminMovieFormUI.fxml).
AdminMovieListUIController
Controller for the Admin Movie List screen (AdminMovieListUI.fxml).
Booking
Represents a single movie ticket booking placed by a registered user.
BookingRepository
Static in-memory repository that holds all Booking records for the currently logged-in user.
Credential
Represents a registered user account in the Ketchup application.
CredentialRepository
Static in-memory repository that holds all registered Credential records.
CustomerBookingConfirmUIController
Controller for the Booking Confirmation modal (CustomerBookingConfirmUI.fxml).
CustomerBookingDetailUIController
Controller for the Booking Detail modal (CustomerBookingDetailUI.fxml).
CustomerHomeUIController
Controller for the Customer Home screen (CustomerHomeUI.fxml).
CustomerMovieDetailUIController
Controller for the Movie Detail screen (CustomerMovieDetailUI.fxml).
CustomerSeatSelectionUIController
Controller for the Seat Selection modal (CustomerSeatSelectionUI.fxml).
DatabaseService
Singleton service responsible for two concerns: Lifecycle — starts and stops the embedded MariaDB server via MariaDB4j.
DisplayMessage
Utility class that centralizes all user-facing dialog box interactions in the Ketchup application.
KetchupMain
The main entry point of the Ketchup application.
LoginUIController
Controller for the Login screen (LoginUI.fxml).
Main
 
Movie
Represents a single movie screening entry in the Ketchup application.
MovieRepository
Static in-memory repository that holds all Movie screening records.
RegisterUIController
Controller for the Register screen (RegisterUI.fxml).
TicketPdfExportService
Utility service that generates a PDF movie ticket for a Booking.
